Riverside Bistro
호텔 투숙객 디너 혜택

도심 야경과 함께하는 제휴 메뉴

호텔 제휴 검토용 안내
프런트에서 바로 안내 가능한 주변 음식점 혜택

투숙객에게 위치, 운영 시간, 메뉴별 가격을 한 번에 안내하고 예약 또는 쿠폰 적용 여부를 확인할 수 있습니다.

위치 안내
메뉴 금액 표시
제휴 할인
대표 메뉴와 금액을 항목별로 관리합니다.
방문 전 좌석 가능 여부와 적용 조건을 확인합니다.
단체 식사 요청은 담당자 연락처와 함께 남깁니다.
계약 문의 연락처
Minh Nguyen

results.title: 로그아웃 후 뒤로가기 보호
results.procedure: 로그아웃 버튼 클릭 후 세션 삭제, 로그인 이동, 뒤로가기 보호

results.title: 내 정보 이메일·비밀번호 변경과 재로그인

details.message: Staff on leave cannot log in.

results.title: Empty and malformed credentials are rejected before login
Staff edit opens once and uses English labels
Add Staff matches edit form and uses English labels
Expense currency follows the PHP hotel currency policy
Existing expense values load and persist after edit
Expense deletion removes the record after confirmation
Expense custom date range retains both selected dates
Clean vacant room saves the reservation to the clicked room
Dirty room cancel blocks save and continue saves the reservation

details.warning: 배정 객실 청소가 아직 완료되지 않았습니다. 체크인은 진행할 수 있지만 객실 준비 상태는 하우스키핑 확인 대상으로 남습니다. 청소가 완료되지 않은 객실입니다. 그래도 신규 예약을 등록할까요?

results.title: Room 1203 remains selected and saves as room 1203
leave staff login is rejected with status guidance
retired staff login is rejected with status guidance
Termination date before hire date is rejected
Final administrator role cannot be removed
Today check-in list pagination
results.procedure: Render seven arrivals and verify next/previous paging.

results.title: Notification target validation
results.procedure: Open a valid target and reject an invalid target.

details.invalidMessage: 연결된 대상을 찾을 수 없습니다. 알림을 새로고침하거나 해당 메뉴에서 다시 확인해주세요.

results.title: Maintenance room booking guard
results.procedure: Block maintenance room booking and save a clean room booking to the clicked room.

details.blockedMessage: 점검/수리 중인 객실은 예약할 수 없습니다.

results.title: Overdue reservation check-in
results.procedure: Check in an overdue confirmed reservation and verify storage and room state.

results.title: Future reservation early check-in guard
results.procedure: Attempt check-in before the reservation date and verify no state change.

details.message: 체크인 예정일 전에는 체크인할 수 없습니다. 예약 취소 또는 예약 수정만 가능합니다.

results.title: In-house room move persistence
results.procedure: Move an in-house reservation and verify history and room states.

results.title: Cancellation and room release
results.procedure: Cancel a confirmed reservation and verify persistent status and released room.

results.title: Group basic information persistence
results.procedure: Edit the event name, dates, headcount and discount; save and verify the stored group.

stored.name: Samsung QA Event
stored.note: July 8 demo corporate group with in-house, arrival, rooming, and ancillary scenarios.

results.title: Group date validation
results.procedure: Enter a checkout date before check-in and verify that saving is rejected.

results.title: Room allocation persistence
results.procedure: Add two available rooms, save the allocation, and verify rates and storage.

results.title: primary rooming guest persistence
results.procedure: Open the rooming guest modal, enter a guest, save, and verify the group rooming list.

results.title: companion rooming guest persistence
results.procedure: Open the rooming guest modal, enter a guest, save, and verify the group rooming list.

results.title: Rooming guest edit and delete
results.procedure: Edit a stored companion and then delete it after confirmation.

results.title: Linked company deletion guard
results.procedure: Attempt to delete a company with linked events and verify the company remains.

results.title: In-use room type deletion guard
results.procedure: Attempt to delete an in-use room type and verify no deletion.

results.title: Duplicate room number validation
results.procedure: Try to register an existing room number and verify no duplicate is created.

results.title: Room operational status persistence
results.procedure: Change a vacant room to maintenance and back, checking storage and UI.

results.title: Rate calendar month navigation
results.procedure: Change month and verify the selector, calendar rows and data month stay aligned.

results.title: Daily rate persistence
results.procedure: Edit one visible rate, save, reload, and verify local storage.

results.title: Date-specific rate isolation
results.procedure: Edit one date and confirm the adjacent date remains unchanged.

results.title: Batch rate range application
results.procedure: Apply a rate to a two-day inclusive range and verify both boundary dates.

results.title: Rate reset confirmation
results.procedure: Change a rate, reset the current month after confirmation, and verify the room-type base rate.

results.title: Create housekeeping task
results.procedure: Create a cleaning task for a room and verify the task is persisted.

results.title: Start housekeeping task
results.procedure: Move a pending task into inspection and verify persisted state.

results.title: Complete housekeeping inspection
results.procedure: Complete an inspection through maintenance and verify task and room are clean.

results.title: Housekeeping view parity
results.procedure: Switch between Kanban and table and verify task counts stay equal.

results.title: Create maintenance request
results.procedure: Register a request and verify all form values in persistent storage.

results.title: Maintenance start state
results.procedure: Start a stored maintenance request and verify persisted state.

results.title: Maintenance completion state
results.procedure: Complete an in-progress request and verify completion timestamp and persistence.

results.title: Ancillary in-house room guard
results.procedure: Verify every displayed room has an assigned in-house guest.

results.title: Create ancillary POS order
results.procedure: Register a POS item for an in-house guest and verify persisted order fields.

results.title: Ancillary status lifecycle
results.procedure: Move a pending order through accepted and completed states.

results.title: Reopen ancillary order
results.procedure: Reopen a completed order and verify accepted state, action and audit log survive storage reload.

results.title: Complete settlement without opening detail
results.procedure: Complete a zero-balance folio from the list path and verify no modal opens.

results.title: Reopen settlement with audit
results.procedure: Reopen a completed folio and verify completion removal, reopened state and audit record.

results.title: Cash expense lifecycle
results.procedure: Create, edit and delete a cash expense and verify list and cash-session synchronization.

results.title: Reopen completed housekeeping task
results.procedure: Reopen a completed task and verify task/room/audit persistence.

results.title: Edit housekeeping task
results.procedure: Open the task editor, change assignee/priority/note, save, and re-read storage.

results.title: Delete housekeeping task with lifecycle guard
results.procedure: Delete pending task and verify active task deletion is blocked.

results.title: Housekeeping filters and counts
results.procedure: Apply every status filter and compare rendered rows with task source.

results.title: Housekeeping priority localization and tablet stability
results.procedure: Open editor in KO/EN at tablet width and verify stable options and dimensions.

results.title: Maintenance request blocks room sales
results.procedure: Register request and verify selected room becomes out of service.

results.title: Maintenance completion restores room
results.procedure: Complete request and verify prior room state is restored.

results.title: Edit maintenance request
results.procedure: Edit open request through modal and verify fields persist.

results.title: Delete maintenance request with lifecycle guard
results.procedure: Delete open request; verify active request cannot be deleted.

results.title: Maintenance view parity
results.procedure: Compare Kanban and table rows/counts from same filtered source.

results.title: Maintenance status and priority filters
results.procedure: Apply each status and urgent priority filter and compare source results.

results.title: Non-maintenance room regression
results.procedure: Block one room and verify another normal room remains available.

results.title: Chained in-house room moves
results.procedure: Move one in-house reservation 1201 -> 1202 -> 1203 and verify identifiers, room states, history and audits.

results.title: Repeated settlement complete/reopen cycle
results.procedure: Complete, reopen, complete, reopen and verify records, state and audit counts remain consistent.

charges.desc: Late checkout 취소 후 조정 금액
Late checkout 취소 후 조정 금액

results.title: Repeated ancillary complete/reopen cycle
results.procedure: Complete and reopen the same ancillary order twice; verify final state, storage and one audit per reopen.

results.title: Expense payment-method resynchronization
results.procedure: Create a cash expense, edit it to card, then back to cash with a new amount and verify cash-session withdrawal synchronization.

results.title: Language switch preserves active reservation form
results.procedure: Open a reservation, enter an unsaved note, switch Korean to English and verify the value remains while labels update.

results.title: Ancillary reopen permission and audit
results.procedure: Reject a completed-order reopen without permission, then grant permission and verify one persisted reopen audit.

results.title: Settlement reopen permission and audit
results.procedure: Reject settlement reopen without permission, then grant permission and verify state persistence and one audit.

results.title: Placard live preview and landscape print
results.procedure: Verify check-in-only placard availability, live flight preview, persistence and A4 landscape output.

details.html:
Alexandria Montgomery 외 3명
Korean Air KE641
The Grand Saigon

results.title: Reservation filter count and state invariance
results.procedure: Open every board filter and verify the active count equals rendered cards and shared reservations keep the same state class.

results.title: Ancillary reference follows room move
results.procedure: Move an in-house reservation and verify its linked ancillary order follows the new room without changing reservation identity.

results.title: Folio reference follows room move
results.procedure: Move an in-house reservation and verify the directly linked folio points to the new room while keeping its folio and reservation identities.

results.title: Expense deletion reverses cash withdrawal
results.procedure: Create a cash expense, delete it, and verify both the expense and its linked cash withdrawal are removed.

withdrawalsBefore.note: [비품 구매] 비품 - QA Delete Cash Expense - QA Vendor

results.title: Expense currency edit clears previous bucket
results.procedure: Create a PHP expense, edit it to USD, and verify storage and KPI buckets no longer retain the previous PHP amount.

results.title: Malformed expense storage recovery
results.procedure: Open the expense page with malformed expense and cash-session storage and verify it recovers without runtime errors or destructive writes.

results.title: Early checkout remains completed
results.procedure: Check out an in-house reservation before its planned departure and verify it stays completed, records the actual departure and releases the room as dirty.

results.title: Checkout cleaning returns every room field to clean
results.procedure: Complete a checkout cleaning task and verify status, front status and housekeeping status all persist as vacant-clean after reload.

results.title: Board-selected room survives date changes
results.procedure: Open a new booking from room 1203, change the stay dates twice and verify the selected room never falls back to another room.

results.title: Repeated checkout is idempotent
results.procedure: Trigger checkout twice concurrently and verify only one completion mutation and one checkout audit are persisted.

results.title: Dirty-room check-in requires confirmation
results.procedure: Cancel a dirty-room check-in once, then confirm it and verify only the confirmed attempt changes state and writes one audit.
